name: @narada2/surface-feedback-mcp
description: Cross-site MCP surface feedback intake and routing MCP surface.

scripts.test: pnpm --filter @narada2/task-lifecycle-mcp build && pnpm build && node dist/test/protocol-smoke.test.js && node dist/test/surface-feedback-mcp.test.js && node dist/test/task-lifecycle-client.test.js && node dist/test/surface-feedback-task-lifecycle-integration.test.js && node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning dist/test/site-fabric-feedback-e2e.test.js
